# PERF-145 positive: r.WithContext in a middleware
lang: go
file: PERF-145-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

func Middleware(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		ctx := context.WithValue(r.Context(), "userID", 42)
		r = r.WithContext(ctx)
		next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
	})
}
